case_name: P. Chidambaram vs Central Bureau of Investigation
summary: Default bail rights when chargesheet not filed within prescribed time
key_holding: If chargesheet is not filed within 60 days (normal) or 90 days (serious offences), accused is entitled to default bail as a matter of right.
impact: Protects constitutional right to speedy trial
full_text: Silence of the investigating agency cannot be at the cost of liberty of the accused. Default bail is a constitutional guarantee.
